title: Business and Data Analyst
description:
Role and Responsibility

  • Gather, analyse, and document business requirements from stakeholders.
  • Translate business needs into technical requirements.
  • Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation (such as Requirements Specification, Functional Specification) using industry standard notations.
  • Create test scenarios, test cases and conduct user acceptance test, integration and system testing.
  • Assist in the entire project development life cycle.
  • Monitor project progress to ensure project is delivered on time, assist in testing and implementation of solutions.
  • Gather, clean, validate, and prepare data from multiple sources for analysis and reporting.
  • Extract, transform, and prepare data using appropriate data querying and reporting tools to support business requirements.
  • Develop and maintain dashboards and recurring reports to track KPIs and operational performance.
  • Define KPI metrics and business rules with stakeholders to ensure consistent reporting.
  • Ensure data accuracy through reconciliations, data-quality checks, and documentation of assumptions andlogic.
  • Perform ad-hoc analysis to identify trends, anomalies, and root causes, translate findings into recommendations.
  • Present insights in a clear, actionable way using visuals, summaries, and stakeholder-friendly storytelling.
  • Support automation and standardisation of reporting (templates, scheduled refresh, reusable datasets).
  • Other project related ad-hoc duties assigned.

Requirements

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Team player with initiative and able to perform under pressure and deadlines.
  • Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects from beginning to completion.
  • Self-motivated and able to meet deadlines.
  • Ability to work collaboratively with multiple stakeholders.
  • Knowledge in SDLC and project implementation is a plus.
  • Proficient in data querying and analysis techniques (e.g., combining datasets, aggregating results, filtering, and basic performance optimisation).
  • Strong Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, charts, data cleansing).
  • Experience with BI tools such as Power BI or Tableau (data modelling and dashboard design).
  • Good analytical thinking, able to turn business questions into measurable metrics and analysis steps.
  • Minimum 1 year experience in similar role.
  • Candidate must possess at least a Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology or equivalent.

postedCompany.description:
Founded in the year 2001 and staff strength of 60 people, is a leading IT Service Provider in the Information and Communications Technology (ICT) sector. We are dedicated to building and managing infocomm network infrastructure, implementing business solutions and delivering high value professional services for corporate organizations. This is done so that our customers have an integrated and trusted platform to conduct their businesses.

Key Competencies and Business Focus

Genesis is a unique breed of the fast emerging ICT player to provide end-to-end consulting and implementation services to corporate customers. The 5 main areas of focus and specialization are:

  • IT Disaster Recovery and Business Continuity Planning
  • Managed Services (End-to-end solutions focusing on Enterprise Storage, Security and Infrastructure)
  • IT Manpower Outsourcing
  • Web Applications (Focusing on Fast Enterprise Search)
  • Security Audit and Consulting

We provide coverage in Asia Pacific. Our key market segments are enterprise corporations and MNCs in this region. We also facilitate companies who wish to set up branch offices overseas, in their IT infrastructure needs and requirements.

We are looking for dedicated personnels to join our Team.
postedCompany.name: GENESIS NETWORKS PTE LTD
